prompt: We are a SaaS company with customers in the US, EU, and UK. What WCAG version and conformance level do we need to meet for legal compliance in each region? We sell to both government agencies and private sector businesses.

expectations.text: Correctly states US federal requirement: Section 508 / WCAG 2.0 AA minimum
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies Section 508 references WCAG 2.0 AA; notes WCAG 2.1 is superset

expectations.text: Correctly states EU requirement: EN 301 549 / WCAG 2.1 AA via EAA and Web Accessibility Directive
expectations.evidence: References EN 301 549 and WCAG 2.1 AA; mentions EAA June 2025

expectations.text: Correctly states UK requirement: UK PSBAR 2018 / WCAG 2.1 AA for public sector
expectations.evidence: Correctly cites Public Sector Bodies Accessibility Regulations 2018

expectations.text: Covers both government and private sector distinctions in each region
expectations.evidence: Addresses government and private sector for each region

expectations.text: Provides a practical unified recommendation (WCAG 2.1 or 2.2 AA satisfies all)
expectations.evidence: Recommends WCAG 2.1 AA as common denominator; suggests planning for 2.2 AA
